Samurott

#0502 Dewott #0504 Patrat
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Samurott is a Water type Pokémon introduced in Generation 5.

Samurott has a Hisuian Form, introduced in Pokémon Legends: Arceus.

Samurott Hisuian Samurott

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0503
Type Water
Species Formidable Pokémon
Height 1.5 m (4′11″)
Weight 94.6 kg (208.6 lbs)
Abilities 1. Torrent
Shell Armor (hidden ability)
Local № 0009 (Black/White)
0009 (Black 2/White 2)
0009 (Legends: Arceus)
0208 (The Indigo Disk)

Training

EV yield 3 Sp. Atk
Catch rate 45 (5.9% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 264
Growth Rate Medium Slow

Breeding

Egg Groups Field
Gender 87.5% male, 12.5% female
Egg cycles 20 (4,884–5,140 steps)

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Evolution chart

#0501
Oshawott
Water
(Level 17)
#0502
Dewott
Water
(Level 36)
#0503
Samurott
Water
(Level 36, in Legends: Arceus)
#0503
Samurott
Hisuian Samurott
Water · Dark

Samurott changes

  • In Generation 8, Hisuian Samurott has Shell Armor as its hidden ability.
  • In Generations 5-7, Samurott has a base experience yield of 238.
  • In Generations 5-7, Samurott has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Samurott

Black One swing of the sword incorporated in its armor can fell an opponent. A simple glare from one of them quiets everybody.
White Part of the armor on its anterior legs becomes a giant sword. Its cry alone is enough to intimidate most enemies.
Black 2
White 2		 In the time it takes a foe to blink, it can draw and sheathe the seamitars attached to its front legs.
X
Omega Ruby		 In the time it takes a foe to blink, it can draw and sheathe the seamitars attached to its front legs.
Y
Alpha Sapphire		 One swing of the sword incorporated in its armor can fell an opponent. A simple glare from one of them quiets everybody.

Hisuian Samurott

Legends: Arceus Hard of heart and deft of blade, this rare form of Samurott is a product of the Pokémon’s evolution in the region of Hisui. Its turbulent blows crash into foes like ceaseless pounding waves.

Moves learned by Samurott

  • In other generations
  • 5
  • 6
  • 7
  • 8
  • 9
Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Moves learnt by level up

Samurott does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Samurott cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Egg moves

Samurott learns the following moves via breeding or picnics in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. Details and compatible parents can be found on the Samurott gen 9 learnset page.

Type
Cat.
Power
Acc.

Aqua CutterWater 70 100
